name: Auto Tagger
description: Automatically applies genre, decade, rating, language, and resolution tags to your Jellyfin library. Works hand-in-hand with Seasonal Visibility.
overview: Automatically applies genre, decade, rating, language, and resolution tags to your Jellyfin library.
author: jshafer813

versions.changelog: Rebuild for Jellyfin 10.11.8 and package as a Jellyfin plugin zip.
